page: Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is an x86_64 architecture server belonging to the ECEV5 server family. It features 16 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The system is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include any local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met using external volumes, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. Additionally, there are zero GPUs integrated into this model, and it does not come with complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density, the EC16es_v5 offers a specialized hardware profile designed for memory-intensive workloads rather than raw compute or graphics processing. The absence of local storage and GPUs represents a clear design tradeoff, optimizing the instance for cost-efficient memory scaling. This configuration is suitable for memory-heavy applications, relational databases, enterprise applications, and in-memory caching systems.
description: The Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is a memory-optimized server from the ECEV5 family, featuring 16 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance provides 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage, requiring external Premium Storage volumes, and lacks integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is engineered for memory-intensive workloads where dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density are critical. The qualitative cost efficiency of this instance lies in its specialized resource allocation, making it a suitable choice for hosting relational databases, in-memory caches, and enterprise applications that demand substantial memory capacity without the overhead of local physical disks or graphics accelerators.
og_description: Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure EC16es_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 128.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring sixteen dedicated Intel vCPUs and one hundred twenty-eight gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive workloads.
bullet_points: 16 dedicated Intel vCPUs on x86_64 architecture
128.0 GB of system memory (8.0 GB per vCPU)
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
Managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Optimized for relational databases and in-memory caching
